login.title: Sign in
login.failed: Sign-in failed — please check your email and password.

register.title: Register
register.emailExists: This email address is already registered.
register.emailNotAllowed: This email address is not allowed (e.g. a disposable or free-mail address).
register.closedText: New sign-ups are currently disabled. Please check back later.
register.maintenanceText: We're in maintenance mode right now, so new sign-ups are paused. Please try again later.
register.termsLabel: I accept the Terms and Conditions

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.description: We will send you a link to reset it.
forgot.success: If an account with this email exists, the email is on its way — check your inbox.

reset.title: New password
reset.description: Choose a new password for your account.
reset.invalidLink: This link is invalid — request a new one.
reset.failed: Reset failed — the link may have expired.

auth.networkError: Server unreachable — please try again later.

otp.title: Sign in with code
otp.description: We will send you a 6-digit code — no password needed.
otp.codeDescription: Enter the code we sent to {email}.
otp.requestFailed: Could not request a code — please try again.
otp.invalidCode: The code is wrong or expired — please try again.
otp.phraseHint: Your security phrase (also shown in the email):
otp.switchToOtp: Sign in without password (code via email)
otp.registerDescription: Enter your email, type the code — your account is created automatically.

auth.sessionRevoked: Your session was ended — please sign in again.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordMin: The password must be at least 8 characters long
validation.passwordComplexity: At least 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase, 1 number and 1 special character
validation.nameMin: The name must be at least 2 characters long
validation.bioMax: The bio must be at most 500 characters long
validation.phoneFormat: Enter the number in international format, e.g. +14155552671 (start with +, max 15 digits, no spaces)
validation.termsRequired: Please accept the Terms and Conditions

consent.title: Cookie consent
consent.message: We use cookies for anonymous usage statistics. Analytics only loads after your consent.

profile.phoneDescription: Optional. International format (e.g. +14155552671). Saved to your account.
profile.phoneTaken: This phone number is already in use by another account.
profile.photoHint: Drag & drop or click. JPG, PNG, WebP or GIF, up to 5 MB.
profile.photoTooLarge: Image is too large — max 5 MB.
profile.photoUploadFailed: Photo upload failed — please try again.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.description: Devices and browsers currently signed in to your account.
sessions.signOutFailed: Could not sign out — please try again.
sessions.confirmAllText: This ends every session, including this one — you will be signed out.

password.title: Change password
password.description: Confirm your current password before setting a new one.
password.failed: Password change failed — is the current password correct?

export.title: Export your data
export.description: Download a JSON copy of your account, sessions and comments.

delete.title: Delete account
delete.description: No longer want to use your account? You can delete it here. This action is not reversible — all related data will be permanently removed.
delete.confirmText: Your account and all related data will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

email.title: Email notifications
email.description: Also receive bell notifications (replies, mentions, reminders) by email.
email.offDesc: Notifications only appear in the bell.
email.instantDesc: Each notification as a separate email, as soon as it happens.
email.digestDesc: At most one summary email per day with all new unread notifications.
email.noSmtp: Email delivery is not configured on this server — your choice is saved and takes effect once SMTP is set up.
